body.message: My take on your LOCK 009 accept/reject calls.
body.accepted: Agree with all 8. Input sanitization and resource caps are the must-haves. Schema version constant is a nice touch for future compatibility.

rejected_items.opinion: Agree. Scope creep for LOCK 009. File-based Markdown report is sufficient.
Agree. Too specific — the stable_context_hash approach is better.
Agree. Don't break what works. Additive approach is safer.

modified_items.opinion: Better than attempt_number. The content hash adds uniqueness without relying on counter state.

modified_items.item: Fallback trace IDs for missing task_id
modified_items.opinion: Good catch. The degenerate input case (null/empty task_id) was a gap in my original review.
